name: task-swarm
description: Multi-agent orchestration driven by a pipeline.yml: semantic task groups with cross-group concurrency, fork coders, and per-group reviewer + validator loops. v0.5–0.8 lands FIX-1/2 + 方案 D + inbox sentinel + M7 init dedupe + M2 run-loop + M3 pipeline-end validator. 0.9.0 加 superpowers 集成（方案 A+B）：persona md 顶部加「superpowers 集成」段（A）+ _prompt.py 渲染 task.md 时插入「## 开发纪律（推荐 superpowers skill）」段（B），按 role × mode 推荐 4 skill。**0.9.1 修 0.9.0 的关键 bug**：3 个 persona md frontmatter `tools:` 加 `Skill` —— round 4 实测发现缺 Skill tool 导致方案 A 完全 block (subagent invoke Skill 返回 unavailable)，0.9.1 修后方案 A 真生效。soft dep — superpowers 未装 silently degrade to native（task.md schema 仍是 SoT）。Requires codemap-aimemory 0.4.3+ (codemap knowledge CLI).
